title: Rise and Sing

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Let every nation clap their hands
Let shouts of joy fill all the lands
For awesome is our sovereign Lord
The King of kings shall be adored

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Rise and sing, all the earth
Let your praise ring to the heavens
For the King of all creation reigns
His glory knows no end
(His glory knows no end)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: He chose our heritage divine
Drew nations' bounds with grand design
From mountain peaks to ocean deep
His love eternal He will keep

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Rise and sing, all the earth
Let your praise ring to the heavens
For the King of all creation reigns
His glory knows no end

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: See how He rises with a shout
As trumpets clear ring boldly out
Sing praises to our God above
Who shields all peoples with His love

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: The mighty rulers bow their knee
Before His throne eternally
His power extends from shore to shore
He reigns in glory evermore

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Rise and sing, all the earth
Let your praise ring to the heavens
For the King of all creation reigns
His glory knows no end

sections.label: Bridge
lines: From east to west
From shore to shore
His majesty endures
Forever more
(His majesty endures)

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Rise and sing, all the earth
Let your praise ring to the heavens
For the King of all creation reigns
His glory knows no end

sections.label: Outro
lines: His glory knows no end
(His glory knows no end)

epigraph: For God is the King of all the earth
